# Worktale LLM Context

> Your dev story, told beautifully.

Worktale is a local-first CLI developer journal. It turns git commit history into a personal, private record of everything you built.

## Links

- Full LLM context: https://worktale.org/llm.txt
- Website: https://worktale.org
- Documentation: https://worktale.org/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/worktale/worktale-cli
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/worktale

## Install

```
npm install -g worktale
```

## Key Facts

- Free and open source (MIT license)
- Local-first: all data stored in local SQLite, optional cloud sync via worktale.dev
- Private by default: no account, no telemetry, no network requests
- Reads only git metadata, never source code
- Works with any git remote: GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, self-hosted
- Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Requires Node.js >= 18
